name: Star Strike
description: Star Strike is a Magic core Skylander who first appeared in Skylanders: Swap Force. She is a mysterious alien from the distant cosmos who possesses the ability to harness cosmic energy and reflect projectiles with her magical fans.
biography: Looking for a way to magically banish the Skylanders, Kaos poured through every dusty scroll and ancient tome he could find. Upon stumbling across a rare and extremely powerful spell, he began to recite its words. However, he sneezed midway through the incantation. As a result, instead of sending the Skylanders far away, Star Strike was plucked from her home in the distant cosmos and brought into Skylands. Surprised, Kaos thought he’d won a powerful new ally in the mysterious and reserved Star Strike. But she knew evil when she saw it and promptly unleashed her fierce magical powers on him. Word of her victory over Kaos spread quickly and she was soon asked by Master Eon to join the Skylanders.
personality: You can't pull the wool over this bewitching alien's eyes. She's most likely to send evil into orbit with her star fall blast. She is also described as reserved and mysterious.

story.content: Star Strike was the first to answer Hugo's call to help the Skylanders at the Radiant Isles against an army of Trolls. Unfortunately, she, Tree Rex and Gill Grunt were busy evacuating the inhabitants of Stonetown from a crumbling dam before it gave out, and were unable to go and help Stealth Elf, Pop Fizz, and Wash Buckler.

When Malefor defeated most of the Skylanders that were summoned to protect the Skylanders Academy, Star Strike was one of the remaining heroes that served as the school's last line of defense. Despite assisting her fellow Skylanders in forming a barrier that held back Malefor's massive firebreath, they were ultimately defeated when the evil dragon delivered a devastating tail strike that broke through the Academy walls.

content: Wait! No! Don't tell us what you have!
Bingo!? Aw, man! Doesn't anyone know how to play this game?!

trivia: Star Strike is the one Skylander who can perform her secondary attack, the Cosmic Twirl, while jumping or after stepping on the bounce pad in Swap Force.
Star Strike was originally called Fan Girl.
Despite being the second female Magic Skylander while Ninjini was the first, Star Strike is the first female core Magic Skylander (second one being Déjà Vu).
Coincidentally, they all have featureless eyes.
When she shoots her star at the sheep, their wool changes colors. She is the second Magic Skylander to possess this ability, while Double Trouble was the first with his Eldritch Beam.
Star Strike was a character that people loved instantly, and when the developers showed them that she could reflect her own projectiles, players would just lose their minds.
She slightly resembles Raven from Teen Titans (but only when Raven has her hood on).

She also has similarities with Starfire from "Teen Titans" as both are female, aliens, protagonists, can fly (Star Strike hovers above the ground due to her not having visible legs.), have energy attacks and have the word "star" as the first syllable of their names.

She also resembles Architect from Battle Camp as both have color black in their hoods and outfits, color white and fan shape in their blades, and a shadowy face (Star Strike's face is shadowy except her eyes).
She and Blastermind are both alien based creatures of the Magic Element.
She has the Magic symbol on her tessons (when put together), her dress, and her cape button.

Both Star Strike's cape and hood seem to be held by her golden button, have the same color scheme, and don't match the rest of her outfit. This could mean that her cape and hood are the same piece of cloth.
Star Strike's voice actress, Misty Lee, is known as a professional magician.

Star Strike is noticeably similar to Spotlight: Their attacks are both linked with light, they both have featureless eyes, they are both voiced by Misty Lee, and they both share the same quote, "Time to Shine!"
As a LightCore figure, her eyes light up. Also, after she purchases her Soul Gem ability, "Shooting Star", her face almost lights up completely blocking her glowing eyes within the game.
She, Gearshift, and Rocky Roll are the only Skylanders that has the same number in all their stats.
Her and Enigma's faces are covered by their hoods. Coincidentally, they are both of the Magic element. However Star Strike's eyes can be seen, while Enigma's head is invisible.
Her quote "Starlight, star fight!" is the base for the pun of Lob-Star's official catchphrase "Star Bright, Star Fight!"
At the beginning of her Soul Gem preview, her cape is missing.

trailers.name: Skylanders Swap Force - Meet the Skylanders - Star Strike (Shoot For the Stars)
Skylanders Swap Force - Star Strike Soul Gem Preview (Shoot for the Stars)
Meet the Skylanders LightCore Star Strike

gameplay: Star Strike's gameplay revolves around projectile reflection. Her primary attack summons a star that attacks enemies and then returns to her; by using her secondary spin attack at the right moment, she can reflect the star to increase its power and damage. She can also summon stars from the sky to rain down on her foes.

basic.name: Star Gate
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to summon a powerful star that will attack nearby enemies then return. Reflect the returning star with Attack 2 to power it up and do more damage.

basic.name: Cosmic Twirl
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to preform a magical spin, reflecting any projectiles nearby.

basic_upgrades.name: Starfall
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to cause stars to fall and damage nearby enemies. Press Attack 2 to deflect the stars at enemies that are farther away.

basic_upgrades.name: Star-Filled Sky
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to cause even more stars to fall and damage nearby enemies

basic_upgrades.name: Your Biggest Fan
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 2 to spin and reflect projectiles. Spin radius is now increased making it more likely to deflect projectiles and power up the star.

basic_upgrades.name: Star Power
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 1 rapidly to shoot star shards at enemies that do increased damage.

soulgems.name: Shooting Stars
soulgems.content: Press Attack 1 rapidly to shoot many sparkling star projectiles at nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Star Light
abilities.content: Starfall now causes a massive explosive star to fall from the sky. Press Attack 2 to deflect it at enemies.

abilities.name: Star Struck
abilities.content: Press Attack 3 to cause powerful stars that do increased damage to fall and damage nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Star Bright
abilities.content: Starfall can be used two times. Set up a star field blockade.

abilities.name: Atom Splitter
abilities.content: Press Attack 1 to shoot a star projectile. Press Attack 2 when it is close to deflect it and shoot two smaller projectiles.

abilities.name: Star Evasion
abilities.content: Armor is increased. No one would have thought that a dress could be so sturdy.

abilities.name: Super Star
abilities.content: Press Attack 1 to shoot a star projectile. Press Attack 2 when it is close to deflect it. Deflecting four times makes it grow larger and do more damage.
